     === RUN   TestLRUCacheTTL
     … +34 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

● All 20 KV store tests pass. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

  Files created:
  - kvstore.go - LRU cache with TTL and file persistence
  - kvstore_handlers.go - HTTP handlers for the key-value store
  - kvstore_test.go - Comprehensive tests

  Features:
  1. GET/PUT/DELETE - Standard CRUD operations via HTTP
  2. TTL-based expiration - Duration strings like "10s", "5m", "1h"
  3. LRU eviction - Automatically evicts least recently used items when at capacity
  4. File-based persistence - JSON file with atomic writes via temp file + rename
  5. Batch operations - _batch and _batch/get endpoints for bulk operations
  6. Cleanup endpoint - Manual trigger to remove expired items

  API Endpoints:

  ┌──────────┬────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Method  │      Path      │             Description             │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ GET      │ /kv/{key}      │ Get value                           │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ PUT/POST │ /kv/{key}      │ Set value (JSON body: {value, ttl}) │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ DELETE   │ /kv/{key}      │ Delete key                          │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ GET      │ /kv/_keys      │ List all keys                       │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ POST     │ /kv/_cleanup   │ Remove expired items                │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ GET      │ /kv/_stats     │ Store statistics                    │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ POST     │ /kv/_batch     │ Batch set                           │
  ├──────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ POST/GET │ /kv/_batch/get │ Batch get                           │
  └──────────┴────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────┘

  Usage example:
  store := NewKVStore(1000, "/data/kvstore.json")
  mux.Handle("/kv/", http.StripPrefix("/kv", store.KVStoreHandler()))

✻ Brewed for 4m 14s

  5 tasks (4 done, 1 in progress, 0 open)
  ✔ Create API versioning types and configuration
  ✔ Implement version detection middleware
  ✔ Implement versioned router with fallback support
  ✔ Add versioned handlers and routes
  ◼ Add comprehensive versioning tests
